findings.evidence: `rg -n "prefixLaw_apply|Fin.castLE|rfl" code/TauCeti/Probability/Exchangeability/Contractability.lean` shows lines 172-176: `rw [prefixLaw_apply, map_blockLaw_reindex μ _ (Fin.castLE hmn) ...]; rfl`.
findings.fix: Add a named lemma such as `map_prefixLaw_castLE`/`map_prefixLaw_reindex` stating this projection of a prefix law explicitly, and use it in `contractable_of_exchangeable` instead of the local unfold-plus-`rfl`.
findings.issue: `hRHS` proves the prefix-law projection by `rw [prefixLaw_apply, map_blockLaw_reindex ...]; rfl`, relying on the definitional equality of `((fun i : Fin n => i.val) ∘ Fin.castLE hmn)` with the shorter prefix index through the `Fin.castLE` wrapper.

summary: The main proof closes a reusable projection fact by unfolding `prefixLaw` and relying on definitional equality through `Fin.castLE`; that should be factored into an explicit lemma to make the proof robust.
